title: ITALY enforcement action against Groupharma s.r.l.s. (3,000)
summary: Insufficient fulfilment of data subjects rights The Italian DPA has imposed a fine of EUR 3,000 on Groupharma s.r.l.s. Following the termination of an employment contract, a former employee requested that the controller delete his personal data from their website and send him the final version of the employment contract before termination...
dedupKey: italy enforcement action against groupharma s r l s 3 000|2026-02-26
